title: Battery Spencer in San Francisco: My Favorite Golden Gate Bridge Viewpoint
content: You are here: Home / USA / Battery Spencer in San Francisco: My Favorite Viewpoint of the Golden Gate Bridge. # Battery Spencer in San Francisco: My Favorite Viewpoint of the Golden Gate Bridge. **Visiting San Francisco and looking for the absolute BEST viewpoint of the Golden Gate Bridge? Head on over to Battery Spencer — one of my all-time favorite views of the Golden Gate, and probably all of San Francisco! If you’re visiting SF, I can almost bet that seeing the Golden Gate Bridge is on your **San Francisco bucket list**! And it’s freaking gorgeous — there’s a reason it’s one of the most photographed bridges in the world! While there are tons of **Golden Gate Bridge viewpoints**, marveling at the bridge from Battery Spencer is, in my opinion, the absolute best place! It is THE signature view of the Golden Gate Bridge afterall. Battery Spencer’s one of my favorite **spots for sunset in San Francisco**!
